perturbation.original_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, each party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below. Date: April 7, 2020 BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION By: Ally Pecarro Name: Ally Pecarro Title: Attorney-in-fact BANC OF AMERICA PREFERRED FUNDING CORPORATION By: Michael Jentis Name: Michael Jentis Title: Authorized Signatory
perturbation.changed_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, each party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below. Date: April 7, 2020 BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION By: Ally Pecarro Name: Ally Pecarro Title: Attorney-in-fact BANC OF AMERICA PREFERRED FUNDING CORPORATION By: Michael Jentis Name: Michael Jentis
perturbation.explanation: By removing the 'Title: Authorized Signatory' the contract introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the necessary authorization for executing the agreement. By not stating the Title, it creates uncertainty whether they were authorize to sign the agreement, which is an implied responsability from the text. The original clause provides assurance that each party is 'duly authorized,' but now, for one the parties there is no proof if they are indeed authorized.
perturbation.contradicted_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, each party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below. Date: April 7, 2020 BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION By: Ally Pecarro Name: Ally Pecarro Title: Attorney-in-fact BANC OF AMERICA PREFERRED FUNDING CORPORATION By: Michael Jentis Name: Michael Jentis
perturbation.justification: The removal of "Title: Authorized Signatory" from the Changed Text creates a strong contradiction with the Contradicted Text, as it introduces uncertainty regarding the authorization of Michael Jentis to sign the agreement. The Contradicted Text, echoing the original text, explicitly states that each party is 'duly authorized'. By omitting the title, the Changed Text removes the verifiable confirmation of authorization for BANC OF AMERICA PREFERRED FUNDING CORPORATION, thus directly conflicting with the assurance of authorization presented in the Contradicted Text.
